TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Craig Anton kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 8, Craig Anton, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya Anton mrkyas ru htagan beh sa Omaha,Nebraska . maki qutux ssew mlikuy Brian lalu nya,qutux qbsuyan kneril ru qutux ssew kneril. 1980 kawas tmasoq mqwas beh Omaha Burke pqwasan biru. trang laqi cipoq lga Anton aring mqwas ru myug maki Omaha,Nebraska. mopuw pitu kawas cyux squliq psibay. pincyogan nya 1978 kawas 高中 lga,maki sici cilopu mqaws ru myugi. hiya ga tmwang Nebraska krahu' pqwasan biru.1983 kawas magal squilq psibay ru ego biru. 1980 kawas Anton qyanux na pincyogun sici squilq psibay maki krahu' pqwasan biru. 1985 kawas pzi'un squilq maki Showtime. 1980 kawas Anton musa New York mqwas ru myugi,suruw lga musa maki Los Angeles 洛杉磯. Anton misu ga cociyaco ,Savannah SCAD pcbaq laqi. 1994 kawas 9 byacing hiya ru Lesley Gray wal kekong la. cyux qahan mtswe kneril. hga misu maki cociyaco ,Savannah . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨraiɣ anton kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨraiɣ anton, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja anton mrkjas~ɕ ru ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa omaħa,neβras~ɕka . maki qutux s~ɕs~ɕew mlikuj βrian lalu nja,qutux qβs~ɕujan kneril ru qutux s~ɕs~ɕew kneril. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βeħ omaħa βurke pqwas~ɕan βiru. traŋ laqi ʦ~ʨipoq lɣa anton ariŋ mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣ maki omaħa,neβras~ɕka. mopuw pitu kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕquliq ps~ɕiβaj. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja **** kawas~ɕ ** lɣa,maki s~ɕiʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨilopu mqaws~ɕ ru mjuɣi. ħija ɣa tmwaŋ neβras~ɕka kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ maɣal s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj ru eɣo βiru. **** kawas~ɕ anton qjanux na pinʦ~ʨjoɣun s~ɕiʦ~ʨi s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ pziʔun s~ɕquilq maki s~ɕħowtime. **** kawas~ɕ anton mus~ɕa new jork mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi,s~ɕuruw lɣa mus~ɕa maki los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ ***. anton mis~ɕu ɣa ʦ~ʨoʦ~ʨijaʦ~ʨo ,s~ɕa*annaħ s~ɕʦ~ʨa* pʦ~ʨβaq laqi. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħija ru les~ɕlej ɣraj wal kekoŋ la. ʦ~ʨjux qaħan mts~ɕwe kneril. ħɣa mis~ɕu maki ʦ~ʨoʦ~ʨijaʦ~ʨo ,s~ɕa*annaħ . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Craig Anton kawas tay 1962, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 8, Craig Anton, squliq na Bunge'. qnxan nya Anton mrkyas ru htagan beh sa Omaha,Nebraska . maki qutux ssew mlikuy Brian lalu nya,qutux qbsuyan kneril ru qutux ssew kneril. 1980 kawas tmasoq mqwas beh Omaha Burke pqwasan biru. trang laqi cipoq lga Anton aring mqwas ru myug maki Omaha,Nebraska. mopuw pitu kawas cyux squliq psibay. pincyogan nya 1978 kawas 高中 lga,maki sici cilopu mqaws ru myugi. hiya ga tmwang Nebraska krahu' pqwasan biru.1983 kawas magal squilq psibay ru ego biru. 1980 kawas Anton qyanux na pincyogun sici squilq psibay maki krahu' pqwasan biru. 1985 kawas pzi'un squilq maki Showtime. 1980 kawas Anton musa New York mqwas ru myugi,suruw lga musa maki Los Angeles 洛杉磯. Anton misu ga cociyaco ,Savannah SCAD pcbaq laqi. 1994 kawas 9 byacing hiya ru Lesley Gray wal kekong la. cyux qahan mtswe kneril. hga misu maki cociyaco ,Savannah . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨraiɣ anton kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, ʦ~ʨraiɣ anton, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qnxan nja anton mrkjas~ɕ ru ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa omaħa,neβras~ɕka . maki qutux s~ɕs~ɕew mlikuj βrian lalu nja,qutux qβs~ɕujan kneril ru qutux s~ɕs~ɕew kneril. **** kawas~ɕ tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ βeħ omaħa βurke pqwas~ɕan βiru. traŋ laqi ʦ~ʨipoq lɣa anton ariŋ mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣ maki omaħa,neβras~ɕka. mopuw pitu kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕquliq ps~ɕiβaj. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja **** kawas~ɕ ** lɣa,maki s~ɕiʦ~ʨi ʦ~ʨilopu mqaws~ɕ ru mjuɣi. ħija ɣa tmwaŋ neβras~ɕka kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru.**** kawas~ɕ maɣal s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj ru eɣo βiru. **** kawas~ɕ anton qjanux na pinʦ~ʨjoɣun s~ɕiʦ~ʨi s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj maki kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ pziʔun s~ɕquilq maki s~ɕħowtime. **** kawas~ɕ anton mus~ɕa new jork mqwas~ɕ ru mjuɣi,s~ɕuruw lɣa mus~ɕa maki los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ ***. anton mis~ɕu ɣa ʦ~ʨoʦ~ʨijaʦ~ʨo ,s~ɕa*annaħ s~ɕʦ~ʨa* pʦ~ʨβaq laqi. **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħija ru les~ɕlej ɣraj wal kekoŋ la. ʦ~ʨjux qaħan mts~ɕwe kneril. ħɣa mis~ɕu maki ʦ~ʨoʦ~ʨijaʦ~ʨo ,s~ɕa*annaħ . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
